title: Pan-Seared Fish with Cacio e Pepe Sauce
description: A classic Italian dish with a twist, pairing pan-seared fish with a creamy cacio e pepe sauce.
instructions: Season the fish fillets with salt, pepper, and dried herbs.
Heat the butter in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the fish for 2-3 minutes on each side until golden brown.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes.
Meanwhile, prepare the cacio e pepe sauce by combining the grated parmesan and a pinch of black pepper.
Remove the skillet from the oven and top each fish fillet with a spoonful of cacio e pepe sauce.
